title: Flaky Korean Peas Skillet
description: A rich and flaky solo-dinner Korean dish featuring frozen peas, served in a cast-iron skillet. This ovo-vegetarian-friendly recipe is perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, sugar, and salt.
Add the cold butter to the bowl and use a pastry blender to work it into the flour mixture until it resembles coarse crumbs.
Stir in the thawed peas, sesame oil, garlic, and green onions.
Press the mixture into a cast-iron skillet.
Make two wells in the mixture and crack an egg into each well.
Season with black pepper to taste.
Bake the skillet in the preheated oven for 25 minutes, or until the eggs are set and the mixture is golden brown.
Remove the skillet from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
